questions.question: The two types of data analysis are
questions.explanation: Data analysis is categorized into qualitative, which involves non-numerical data like descriptions, and quantitative, which deals with numerical statistics[cite: 2426, 2427].

questions.question: Fill in the blank. To perform an ANOVA, we must have a ….. response variable and at least one…. factor.
questions.explanation: ANOVA (Analysis of Variance) requires a continuous response variable and at least one categorical factor to compare differences between groups[cite: 2429, 2430, 2431].

questions.question: Select the statement(s) that denote the type of ANOVA. Statement I: One way analysis Statement II: Two way analysis Statement III: K-way analysis
questions.explanation: ANOVA is classified by the number of factors: One-way, Two-way, or K-way analysis for multiple factors[cite: 2432, 2434].

questions.question: What is the type of the data dispersion?
questions.explanation: Data dispersion, which describes how values are spread, includes metrics like range, average absolute deviation, and variance[cite: 2436, 2437, 2438].

questions.question: The two most relevant sensors directly used in agricultures are ………..

options.b: Soil moisture and water level sensor
options.c: ECG sensor and water level sensor

questions.explanation: Soil moisture and water level sensors are critical in agriculture for monitoring soil hydration and water availability for irrigation[cite: 2439, 2441].

questions.question: The mathematical equation that is formulated in the form of relationships between variables is known as………
questions.explanation: A statistical model utilizes mathematical equations to represent and analyze the relationships between different variables[cite: 2443, 2444].

questions.question: What are the two types of statistical models?
questions.explanation: Statistical models are classified as complete if they describe all population parameters or incomplete if information is partial[cite: 2446, 2448].

questions.question: Select the correct order of the component layers present in the IoT healthcare.

options.a: Sensing layer, cloud platform layer, aggregated layer, processing layer
options.b: Sensing layer, aggregated layer, processing layer, cloud platform layer
options.c: Aggregated layer, sensing layer, processing layer, cloud platform layer
options.d: Sensing layer, processing layer, aggregated layer, cloud platform layer

questions.explanation: IoT healthcare follows a flow from the sensing layer (data collection) to the aggregated layer, then the processing layer, and finally the cloud platform layer[cite: 2450, 2451, 2453].

questions.question: Wireless IoT driven solutions for remote healthcare facility provisioning brings healthcare to patients than bringing patients to healthcare.
questions.explanation: Wireless IoT allows remote monitoring, effectively delivering medical services to the patient's location rather than requiring physical travel[cite: 2454, 2455, 2456].

questions.question: Which of the following handheld devices are used for activity monitoring?
questions.explanation: Handheld monitoring devices commonly use accelerometers to track movement and GPS to track location and distance[cite: 2457, 2458, 2459].

questions.question: Which of the following are components of IoT?
questions.explanation: IoT functionality relies on the combined sensing, aggregated, and processing layers[cite: 2460, 2462, 2463].

questions.question: By performing continuous monitoring of a person's activity, it is not possible to observe his/her behavior or to identify any repetitive pattern in his/her day-to-day activity.
questions.explanation: Continuous monitoring specifically enables the tracking of behavioral patterns and the identification of repetitive daily routines[cite: 2464, 2465].

questions.question: Deep learning based data analysis cannot be performed on videos
questions.explanation: Deep learning techniques, such as CNNs and RNNs, are effectively used to process video frames and identify patterns[cite: 2467, 2468, 2469].

questions.question: Which of the following are the inbuilt sensors that are present in high end smartphones?
questions.explanation: High-end smartphones are typically equipped with accelerometers, compasses, and gyroscopes for navigation and activity tracking[cite: 2470, 2472, 2473].

questions.question: Fill in the blank. Processing the handheld activity device data with artificial intelligence can be used for
questions.explanation: AI analysis of motion data from handheld devices is used for critical applications like fall detection for emergency alerts[cite: 2474, 2475, 2476].
